'''Darth Vader's secretary''' was in reality a [[Changeling/Legends|shapeshifting]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] who accompanied [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] to [[Aargau/Legends|Aargau]], along with two other assassins, to kill [[Viscount (title)/Legends|Viscount]] [[Tardi]]. While the Viscount was visiting the [[Garden of Butterflies]], the shapeshifter changed into a rare [[Butterfly/Legends|butterfly]] with a poisonous sting and set off to attack Tardi. However, [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa]] quickly observed that the butterfly was approaching Tardi, and she ordered [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] to spray it with fire retardant. This caused the butterfly to fall to the ground, where Leia discreetly crushed it with her foot, killing the shapeshifter.
